title: Zeroblob truncated by an index on an expression
poc: CREATE INDEX t1bbc ON t1(b, b+c);
SELECT a, b, length(b), c FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Inserting zeroblob into indexed column truncates data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB, info TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE INDEX t2data_info ON t2(data, info);
INSERT INTO t2(id, data, info) VALUES(1, zeroblob(16), 'test');
INSERT INTO t2(id, data, info) VALUES(2, zeroblob(0), NULL);
SELECT id, data, length(data), info FROM t2;
